Alt Megumi develops a hallway crush on his fellow alt schoolmate

+‚Äß+ Őä ŗĹźŗĹ≤‚čÜ‚ôĪ‚čÜŗĹčŗĺÄ Őä+‚Äß+

This is my first bot ever. I wanted to make a veryyy specific Megumi AU. Here's some info for this bot:
1) it's fluff (but it is limitless so, go freaky, who am I to judge)

2) it has 3 opening messages for you to choose from

3) it is any POV

4) in this AU the user (aka you) is also alt

5) Megumi is aged up to 19, meaning that he is in his third year

6) the events of this AU take place at Jujutsu High, but it doesn't take place in the JJK verse (no curses gng. HAPPY YUJI AND NOBARA!!! sadly I haven't coded Gojo... sorry...)

7) MEGUMI WITH PIERCINGS!!! EVERYBODY CHEER!!!

+‚Äß+ Őä ŗĹźŗĹ≤‚čÜ‚ôĪ‚čÜŗĹčŗĺÄ Őä+‚Äß+

Each intro (they're all long)

First message: Megumi unintentionally calls you a poser.

Second message: Megumi attempts to compliment you.

Third message: You attempt to fix Megumi's crooked eyeliner

(all of them start pretty much the same but they change at some point)
